description: Style Notewoodland - the giant in the outdoor shoe industry, comes up with this rugged shoe with a refined stance. Wear this with chinos or denims and a checked casual shirt or a tee. Style this with rugged belts.Product DetailsBrown and black slip-on shoe with leather upper, overlays, central lace-ups and pull loop at the heel collarPadded and elasticated tongue and collarBranding on the lateral sideDurable rubber outsole with horizontal and vertical groovesMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
